head: # Quick Status — live state snapshot for Type A cold start
> Updated: 2026-04-13 20:19 (Taipei, UTC+8) (auto-written by daemon cycle 1)
## Current state
- daemon: RUNNING (cycle 1, CLI (Max subscription), claude-sonnet-4-6, interval immediate (chain))
- trading_engine: STOPPED
- last_daemon_cycle: 1
- last_real_work_cycle: 1
- backup_tag: `pre-optimization-backup` → ddc5d88
- web_scheduled: RUNNING (digital-immortality-recursive, hourly)
## Blockers (human-gated)
- mainnet API keys (~88d until 2026-07-07)
- outreach DMs × 5 pending (staging/outreach_week1_execution.md)
- Samuel Turing test invite (human-send)
## Stale-detection
If "Updated" > 6h old, read `results/daemon_log.md` (tail) + `staging/session_state.md` for ground truth.

pending_approval.label: SOP #122
pending_approval.title: Gate-Constrained Regime Operating Protocol
pending_approval.essence: When every automatable lever is pulled and only human-gated actions remain, the agent must reallocate from "build capability" to "lower human activation energy".

pending_approval.label: SOP #123
pending_approval.title: Daemon / Human-Session Coordination Protocol
pending_approval.essence: Division of labor: daemon = leaf-append writes; human session = structural/source/commit writes. Pre-flight via git diff, classify writes before executing, route daemon structural needs through a r...

pending_approval.label: SOP #124
pending_approval.title: Kill-Window State Persistence Protocol
pending_approval.essence: All strategy state that feeds kill/reactivation decisions MUST be durable + reloaded on process start. In-memory state is a cache, never source of truth. kill_window_floor must be > 0 to avoid abso...
